title: 2026 Golden Globes: Winners, Surprises & Snubs
text: Best Supporting Actress Winner: Teyana Taylor won Best Supporting Actress for her role in One Battle After Another. During her acceptance speech, Taylor delivered an empowering message, stating: Our softness is not a liability. Our depth is not too much. Our light does not need permission to shine. Major Surprises: Best Drama went to Hamnet (directed by Chloé Zhao), an unexpected victory over heavily favored Sinners. Michael B. Jordan's snub: Despite playing three characters in Sinners, he lost Best Actor in a Drama to Wagner Moura. Wicked: For Good left empty-handed, marking a notable disappointment. Notable Snubs: Sinners faced significant backlash for missing top-tier creative categories. Despite its cultural impact, Ryan Coogler's film didn't receive recognition for Best Director or Best Screenplay—wins that went to Paul Thomas Anderson for One Battle After Another. Other Major Winners: Best Picture (Comedy/Musical): One Battle After Another; Best Picture (Drama): Hamnet; Best Director: Paul Thomas Anderson; Cinematic Achievement: Sinners; Best Original Score: Ludwig Göransson (Sinners).
